mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT039#SQL001 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '56' AND CODE_1 = ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'OTHERS', #{fct039Sql001RequestModel.brokerCode}) FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '56' and CODE_1 = #{fct039Sql001RequestModel.brokerCode} ) AND CODE_2 = #{fct039Sql001RequestModel.pointType}
